form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when he was slow out over 450m at Maitland. Prior to that won by 1.5 lengths at Bulli (22.97) beating Ashes To Ashes in a Grade 5 on April 7. Capable of a strong show.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ordinary effort last start when he was slow out over 450m at Maitland. Prior to that won by 1.5 lengths at Bulli (22.97) beating Ashes To Ashes in a Grade 5 on April 7. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 401m at Richmond beaten 9 lengths (23.35) behind Zipping Marquez in a Grade 4/5 on April 12. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 401m at Richmond beaten 9 lengths (23.35) behind Zipping Marquez in a Grade 4/5 on April 12. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Showed blistering pace early and stuck on well despite missing the frame, finishing fourth over 520m Nowra in 29.98. This looks too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed blistering pace early and stuck on well despite missing the frame, finishing fourth over 520m Nowra in 29.98. This looks too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the catching pen raced tightly and hampered.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Bulli (22.74) in a Grade 5, finishing a 2.75 lengths third. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Bulli (22.74) in a Grade 5, finishing a 2.75 lengths third. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped off heels in the first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Finished second last time (21.10) over 365m at Nowra. Awkward draw to overcome. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last time (21.10) over 365m at Nowra. Awkward draw to overcome. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 520m at this track beaten 10 lengths (30.54) behind Ritza Tears in a Grade 5 on April 4. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last over 520m at this track beaten 10 lengths (30.54) behind Ritza Tears in a Grade 5 on April 4. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 520m at this track beaten 13 lengths (30.59) behind Ritza Ringer in a Grade 5 on April 9. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th over 520m at this track beaten 13 lengths (30.59) behind Ritza Ringer in a Grade 5 on April 9. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (29.91) at this track over 520m. Should be around the mark.
